news.summary: In San Mateo, California, the U.S. Army has selected Duality AI's Falcon simulation platform to create AI technology for countering drones based on XM30 standards. This initiative involves utilizing synthetic data with a primary focus on digital methods.
news.headline: US Army partners with Duality AI for AI anti-drone system for XM30; using Falcon sim platform and synthetic data.

news.summary: Durham, North Carolina - On April 10, 2025, the International Society of Automation (ISA) unveiled the release of ANSI/ISA-95.00.01-2025, a significant document (IEC 62264-1 Mod) in enterprise-control system integration. This publication offers essential models and terminology crucial for professionals in the automation field. ISA, a prominent professional society in the industry, continues to provide valuable resources for its members.
news.headline: ISA updates standard for integration of enterprise and manufacturing control systems with publication of ANSI/ISA-95.00.01-2025.

news.summary: Prezent, the enterprise-grade AI platform for business, has recently made a significant strategic appointment aimed at propelling its AI roadmap and enhancing its exclusive 3-in-1 AI presentation agent within the biopharmaceutical sector. The appointment, effective April 10, 2025, in Los Altos, Calif., is anticipated to greatly advance Prezent's operations in this industry.
news.headline: Janet Dorling joins Prezent board to drive AI innovation in biopharma. Proprietary 3-in-1 agent aims to revolutionize industry.

news.summary: A team of seasoned industry professionals has recently joined Open World in Los Angeles on April 10, 2025, to influence the trajectory of the gaming and creator economy. Open World, a leading strategic ally for gaming publishers, brands, and content creators, is bolstering its leadership with the addition of experienced individuals. This move is aimed at enhancing Open World's capabilities and solidifying its position within the industry. The new members bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to the table, poised to drive innovation and growth within the company. This development marks a significant milestone for Open World as it positions itself for future success.
news.headline: Open World hires 3 execs to drive growth and innovation in gaming, attracting experienced leaders to shape the future.

news.summary: The launch of a new multi-tenant infrastructure-as-a-service platform is enabling organizations to upgrade their systems with a high-performance, license-free cloud service. This initiative addresses concerns surrounding vendor lock-in and offers a cutting-edge solution to modernization. The platform provides a scalable and efficient environment for businesses, accommodating multiple tenants simultaneously. With a focus on performance and freedom from licensing constraints, this service opens up new opportunities for organizations looking to optimize their operations.
news.headline: Rackspace Tech launches OpenStack Flex, a multi-tenant infrastructure-as-a-service for enterprise modernization, reducing vendor lock-in concerns.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Denver, SS&C ALPS Advisors, a subsidiary of SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC), announced a collaboration with Ladenburg Thalmann Index, LLC to introduce the ALPS Electrification Infrastructure ETF (Nasdaq: ELFY). The fund, listed as "ELFY" on Nasdaq, aims to capitalize on opportunities in the electrification infrastructure sector. This partnership signifies a strategic move by both companies to leverage the growing potential in this market.
news.headline: SS&C ALPS Advisors launches Electrification Infrastructure ETF (Nasdaq: ELFY) in partnership with Ladenburg Thalmann Index, LLC.

news.summary: The United States is facing a pressing issue with illegal operators dominating a significant portion of the country's online gambling market, which is estimated to be worth $90.1 billion. These illegal entities currently hold control over 74% of the market. American audiences seeking online gaming experiences are frequently encountering illegal gambling content, with reports indicating they are exposed to such content 88% of the time while browsing online. It is crucial for authorities to take action and enforce regulations to combat this concerning trend and protect consumers from potentially harmful and unauthorized gambling activities.
news.headline: CFG report: Illegal operators control 74% of $90.1 billion online gambling market in America, impacting US audiences 88% of the time.

news.summary: In Troy, Michigan on April 10, 2025, Logicalis US revealed their admission into the Military Spouse Employment Partnership (MSEP). This collaboration forms a component of a US Department of Defense program aiming to link military spouses with partner companies dedicated to hiring.
news.headline: Logicalis US joins Military Spouse Employment Partnership (MSEP) to connect military spouses with job opportunities.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 10, 2025, an inventor from Alta Loma, California, shared the inspiration behind TOOTH 4 ONE, a new innovation aimed at revolutionizing toothpaste dispensing and teeth brushing routines at home and on the go. The inventor believed there was a need for greater convenience in this daily task. The TOOTH 4 ONE aims to streamline the brushing process, making it easier for individuals.
news.headline: Inventor from Alta Loma, Calif., invents Tooth 4 One for convenient toothpaste dispensing and brushing, OCM-1695.

news.summary: Health Net, a well-established Medi-Cal managed care health plan in California, has announced significant investments to overcome obstacles young individuals face in pursuing medical education. The funds will support students from a young age through college, aiming to develop future physicians. This initiative is crucial in addressing the shortage of medical professionals. The investment reflects Health Net's commitment to improving healthcare services.
news.headline: Health Net and Centene Foundation donate $9+ million to enhance California's physician workforce, focusing on medical school pipeline and supporting practicing physicians.

news.summary: Aquila Clouds, a leading provider of cloud and AI management solutions based in Pleasanton, California, revealed on April 10, 2025, through a PRNewswire release that Angelo Pruscino has been named as the company's new Chief Technology Officer. Angelo, renowned as the innovator behind Oracle RAC (Real Applications Clusters), assumes this pivotal role to steer Aquila Clouds towards further technical advancements and growth.
news.headline: Aquila Clouds in Pleasanton, Calif. appoints Angelo Pruscino, creator of Oracle RAC, as new Chief Technology Officer.

news.summary: An entertainment projector brand called Yaber, based in Los Angeles, is launching a #ScreenToStage campaign to coincide with the music festival season on April 10, 2025. This initiative aims to engage music enthusiasts as they prepare for this highly anticipated period. Yaber is encouraging audience participation and offering opportunities to win prizes during this festive season.
news.headline: Yaber launches #ScreenToStage giveaway to celebrate music festivals with fans, offering a chance to win entertainment projectors. #OutdoorMusicFestival.

news.summary: An exhibition showcasing the transformative capabilities of Kia's versatile PBVs highlights their diversity, adaptability, and customization potential, reshaping our living experiences. The display includes the production-ready Kia PV5, the PV5 WKNDR outdoor concept vehicle, and the Concept EV2. Collaborations with lifestyle entities further emphasize Kia's innovative approach.

news.summary: Mars Petcare has appointed Helio Fujita as the new Global Vice President of People & Organization. Fujita brings more than 25 years of HR experience to the role and will be joining both the Mars Petcare Leadership Team and the global People & Organization Team. Prior to joining Mars, Fujita was a renowned HR leader at Fresenius Kabi, a global healthcare company. This announcement was made in Brussels on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Helio Fujita appointed as Global P&O VP for Mars Petcare, bringing 25 years of HR experience from Fresenius Kabi.

news.summary: ToonieBet, a brand under Soft2Bet, has recently announced a partnership with the Ottawa Senators, making them the NHL team's Official Online Casino Partner. The collaboration was established on April 10, 2025. As the Ottawa Senators have successfully secured a spot in the NHL playoffs, ToonieBet will actively support and engage with fans throughout the journey.

news.summary: In Richland, Washington, on April 10, 2025, Avalanche Energy, a company specializing in fusion energy, revealed the unveiling of FusionWERX, their latest fusion test facility. This new facility is designed to house modular compact fusion machines and marks a significant step in the company's development.
news.headline: Avalanche Energy opens FusionWERX in Richland, WA to accelerate fusion development.

news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the United States Baby Food and Infant Formula Market predicts substantial growth, with the industry projected to reach US$14.72 billion by 2033. This marks a significant increase from US$9.30 billion in 2024, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.23% between 2025 and 2033. The surge is attributed to heightened parental focus on infant nutrition, the increasing popularity of organic and premium baby food products, and advancements in the sector.
news.headline: United States Baby Food and Infant Formula Market projected to reach $14.72 billion by 2033, growing at 5.23% CAGR.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Legacy Adoption Services (LAS) and Milford's River's Edge Brewing Company announced their collaboration for the third annual Legacy Day in Milford. The event is scheduled for Saturday, May 10 from 5 p.m. to 9 p.m. and aims to support Legacy Adoption.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 10, 2025, an inventor from Emerald Beach, NSW, Australia, unveiled the S W DEVICE 2, aiming to provide a more ergonomic way to use smartphones without causing strain on the neck and back. The device allows for maintaining proper posture while using the phone and aims to enhance comfort.
news.headline: Inventor from Australia creates S W DEVICE 2 phone holder with flexible gooseneck to prevent neck strain.

news.summary: In an exciting collaboration, luxury hospitality brand St. Regis Hotels & Resorts has teamed up with popular fashion house STAUD to produce a limited-edition resort accessories collection. This unique partnership combines legacy luxury and cult-favorite cool to offer customers a one-of-a-kind experience. The collaboration was announced on April 10, 2025, in Bethesda, Md. The collection features a range of modern and effortless accessories, showcasing the best of both brands. This exclusive line is set to wow customers with its design and quality.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in a press release, Tredence unveiled the Tredence Customer 360 platform, aimed at revolutionizing customer intelligence for Telco, Media & Technology (TMT) companies. This innovative solution is set to cater to enterprises in the TMT sectors. Tredence, known for its expertise in data science and AI, introduced this new offering in Las Vegas and Bengaluru, India. This launch marks a significant step for Tredence in providing cutting-edge solutions for businesses within the TMT industry.

The collaboration was officially unveiled in New York on April 10, 2025.

This innovation aims to improve customer engagement and streamline product data management processes on a global scale.

news.summary: In Hong Kong, on April 10, 2025, MasterBeef Group, a restaurant company specializing in Taiwanese cuisine, announced the pricing of its initial public offering of 2,000,000 ordinary shares at a public price of US$4.00 per share. The shares, with a par value of US$0.0005, are set to trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market starting April 10, 2025, under the ticker symbol “MB”. Additionally, 1,815,000 ordinary shares are being registered for potential resale by certain shareholders of the company, with no proceeds going to the company from these sales.
news.headline: MasterBeef Group prices US$8.0M IPO with 2M ordinary shares at US$4.00 each, listed on Nasdaq as "MB," with additional 1.8M shares for resale.

news.headline: Guitar icon Slash leaves Twitter post-account hack promoting Solana meme coin.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in New York, Blend, a prominent data science and AI solutions provider, unveiled their latest eBook titled "The Critical 7: Strategies for Scaling AI." This informative guide is designed to assist organizations in overcoming the seven key obstacles encountered when implementing AI technologies.
news.headline: Blend releases eBook "The Critical 7: Strategies for Scaling AI" to aid enterprise AI adoption.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, in Salt Lake City, the University of Utah's Huntsman Cancer Institute began construction on its second Comprehensive Cancer Center. This new facility aims to provide prevention, hope, and healing to many individuals.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Las Vegas, Vurvey Labs unveiled its latest product, the Autonomous Workflows, driven by the advanced 2a Model. This innovation comes as businesses face growing demands to sustain innovation without the need for extensive manual research or frequent meetings. The new offering aims to streamline operations and enhance efficiency in enterprises.
news.headline: Vurvey Labs introduces Autonomous Workflows with 2a Model for continuous innovation, reducing reliance on manual research.

news.summary: Standard Chartered and OKX have launched a new program on April 10, allowing institutions to use crypto assets and tokenized money market funds (MMFs) as collateral. The program enables off-exchange collateral usage and enhances security by placing custody with a globally systemically important bank. The pilot is under the regulatory oversight of the Dubai Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority with Standard Chartered as the regulated custodian in the Dubai International Financial Centre. The program includes collaboration with Franklin Templeton and Brevan Howard Digital, with OKX clients gaining access to assets from Franklin Templeton's digital assets team. Franklin Templeton will be among the first in a series of MMFs offered under the program. Despite the volatility of digital assets, institutions see crypto collaterals as a major step in the evolution of institutional crypto services. The collaboration is seen as fostering greater trust in the digital asset ecosystem and promoting the institutionalization of the crypto industry.
news.headline: Standard Chartered & OKX partner to pilot crypto, tokenized fund collaterals. Program offers security & custody oversight. Franklin Templeton leads the initiative.

news.summary: In the fall of 2023, Hollywood writers expressed concerns about AI potentially eroding authentic storytelling. Fast forward to 2025, with a public service ad using deepfake technology for election disinformation prevention. Nearly 52% of Americans are worried about AI's expanding role in daily life, and 68% are concerned about online privacy due to deceptive media. AI's rise in democratizing entertainment has led to hyper-realistic generated content, prompting issues of ownership and authenticity. Blockchain tech is increasingly important for validating AI-created media. Current laws do not address AI-generated content ownership, causing potential legal conflicts. Blockchain's role in protecting digital assets and tracking ownership is critical in preventing fraud in sectors like crypto and entertainment. The growing generative AI market highlights the urgency of verifying digital content. Without decentralized verification mechanisms, fraudulent activities may harm industry credibility. Centralized platforms, watermarking, or government databases are not foolproof solutions. Blockchain's scalability aligns with AI advancements, securing intellectual property rights transparently. Failure to implement decentralized verification systems could lead to increased regulatory scrutiny and credibility loss for AI-dependent industries.
news.headline: Blockchain essential for trust in AI-generated content; AI threatens authenticity. Consumers and creators concerned: 52% of Americans wary of AI, 68% globally worried about online privacy. Blockchain key for verifying AI content ownership and maintaining trust in digital media. Decentralized verification needed to prevent fraud and deception. AI-generated scams on the rise in crypto. Blockchain can safeguard digital assets, support authenticity in AI content. Need for decentralized authentication frameworks as AI grows rapidly.

news.summary: Perpetual futures contracts, a key component of the global cryptocurrency market, may soon be offered to American investors as regulations shift during the current administration of President Donald Trump. These high-stakes financial tools, crucial for overseas crypto trading, have historically been off-limits to US retail investors due to regulatory limitations. However, recent legal and structural adjustments have sparked hopes for a potential shift in this restriction. According to Bloomberg, Gabe Rosenberg from Davis Polk & Wardwell stated, "We are seeing progress towards introducing crypto-based derivatives in the US," indicating a change could be imminent. These perpetual contracts, also known as "perps," enable traders to speculate on cryptocurrency values with leverage up to 100x, without possessing the actual assets. Unlike standard futures contracts,... Complete details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Perpetual futures contracts may soon be available to US investors under Trump administration, allowing leverage up to 100x.

news.summary: Rogers-O'Brien Construction, an industry leader in construction innovation, has introduced MirrorScape as its latest offering in the realm of reality capture services. This digital precision service is set to revolutionize the construction sector by providing accurate digital representations. The unveiling took place in Dallas on April 10, 2025, as MirrorScape aims to set new standards in the industry. This launch signals an important move for RO, showcasing their commitment to embracing cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: Rogers-O'Brien debuts MirrorScape Reality Capture Service in Texas, offering digital precision in construction.
